ddls:
CREATE TABLE "dose_distribution" (
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose distribution record */,
  "absolute_dose_gy" REAL /* Absolute dose in Gy */,
  "ptv_14ml" REAL /* Dose delivered to the PTV 14ml */,
  "gtv_4ml" REAL /* Dose delivered to the GTV 4ml */,
  "bowel_284ml" REAL /* Dose delivered to the Bowel 284ml */,
  "stomach_291ml" REAL /* Dose delivered to the Stomach 291ml */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan associated with the dose distribution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dose distribution record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dose distribution record was last updated */,
  "dose_distribution_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dose distribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dose_distribution_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dose_distribution_treatment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Medical history of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the patient record was last updated */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact for the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact for the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient for whom the treatment plan is designed */,
  "plan_name" TEXT /* Name of the treatment plan */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan starts */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan ends */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment plan (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment plan was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment plan was last updated */,
  "treatment_plan_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the treatment plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dose_prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dose prescription */,
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan associated with the dose prescription */,
  "ptv_14ml_dose" REAL /* Prescribed dose for the PTV 14ml */,
  "gtv_4ml_dose" REAL /* Prescribed dose for the GTV 4ml */,
  "bowel_284ml_dose" REAL /* Prescribed dose for the Bowel 284ml */,
  "stomach_291ml_dose" REAL /* Prescribed dose for the Stomach 291ml */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dose prescription was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the dose prescription was last updated */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the dose prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dose_prescriptions_treatment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., oncologist, radiation therapist, researcher) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dose_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dose distribution record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dose distribution record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dose distribution record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dose_id FOREIGN KEY ("dose_id") REFERENCES dose_distribution ("dose_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment session */,
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment plan associated with the session */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the treatment session */,
  "session_time" TEXT /* Time of the treatment session */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment session (e.g., completed, scheduled, canceled) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment session was last updated */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes for the treatment session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_sessions_treatment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_plan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment outcome */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the treatment session associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome of the treatment session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment outcome was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the treatment outcome was last updated */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether a follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_outcomes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES treatment_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient note */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient to whom the note pertains */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text of the note or observation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the note was last updated */,
  "note_category" TEXT /* Category of the note (e.g., treatment, diagnosis, medication) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_notes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "radiation_machines" (
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each radiation machine */,
  "machine_name" TEXT /* Name of the radiation machine */,
  "machine_type" TEXT /* Type of the radiation machine (e.g., LINAC, Gamma Knife) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the machine record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the machine record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radiation machine being maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of maintenance */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Notes on the maintenance performed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_maintenance_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES radiation_machines ("machine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "machine_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "machine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the radiation machine being used */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "usage_hours" REAL /* Number of hours the machine was used */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the usage record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_machine_usage_machine_id FOREIGN KEY ("machine_id") REFERENCES radiation_machines ("machine_id")
)
